programme.title: MacGyver

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: After an earthquake in Hawaii, Mac and the team join Chin and Kono from the Five-0 task force to rescue a group of government scientists trapped in a building; another group tries to steal top-secret weaponry from the scientists.

programme.title: Hellboy

programme.title: Outlander

programme.title: Three Musketeers

programme.title: Robin Hood
programme.desc: An action-packed retelling of the classic legend, filled with thrilling battle sequences and epic adventure.

programme.title: Mercenary for Justice
programme.desc: As a mercenary, John Seeger (Steven Seagal) has a reputation that precedes him. That's why he's being blackmailed into performing a risky job: breaking the son of a wealthy arms dealer out of a South African prison. With his friends taken hostage, Seeger agrees to do the deed -- but finds out too late that he's been double-crossed. Not one who likes being taken for a fool, Seeger hatches an elaborate plan to get even that will make the prison break look like capture the flag.

programme.title: The Contract
programme.desc: Frank Carden (Morgan Freeman), one of the world's greatest assassins, is handed a lucrative contract to kill a highly secretive billionaire. But in a twist of fate, Carden is involved in a car accident during the job, and when his gun is found after he is admitted to a hospital, federal marshals arrest him. Meanwhile, ex-cop Ray Keene (John Cusack) is hiking with his son, Chris (Jamie Anderson), when Carden's cohorts try to spring him from custody, and soon the pair is caught in the crossfire.

programme.title: Mercenary for Justice
programme.desc: As a mercenary, John Seeger (Steven Seagal) has a reputation that precedes him. That's why he's being blackmailed into performing a risky job: breaking the son of a wealthy arms dealer out of a South African prison. With his friends taken hostage, Seeger agrees to do the deed -- but finds out too late that he's been double-crossed. Not one who likes being taken for a fool, Seeger hatches an elaborate plan to get even that will make the prison break look like capture the flag.

programme.title: Animal Factory [Broadcast Edit]
programme.desc: Suburbanite Ron (Edward Furlong) is spoiled, young and not overly worried about the marijuana charges leveled against him. But, after being made out to be a drug dealer, he faces a five-year jail sentence in San Quentin State Prison. Physically frail and unaccustomed to his rough surroundings, Ron is primed to fall victim to sexual predators and bullying guards -- that is, until he's befriended by Earl (Willem Dafoe), a veteran inmate who finds meaning in protecting the vulnerable new kid.

programme.title: My Mom's New Boyfriend
programme.desc: After several years away, FBI agent Henry Durand (Colin Hanks) returns to find his mother, Marty (Meg Ryan), a much different person: Having long mourned for Henry's father, she is now embracing single life. One day, while Marty, Henry and his new fiancée, Emily (Selma Blair), are out for a walk, they meet Tommy (Antonio Banderas), a mysterious stranger, with whom Marty then becomes involved. However, through his FBI contacts, Henry learns that Tommy is suspected of being an art thief.

programme.title: The Marksman
programme.desc: A rancher on the Arizona border becomes the unlikely defender of a young Mexican boy desperately fleeing the cartel assassins who've pursued him into the U.S.

programme.title: Honest Thief
programme.desc: Wanting to lead an honest life, a notorious bank robber turns himself in.

programme.title: Olympus Has Fallen
programme.desc: Terrorists seize the White House; ex-agent fights to save the President.

programme.title: London Has Fallen
programme.desc: World leaders targeted at London funeral; only one bodyguard can stop it.

programme.title: The Shadow Riders
programme.desc: Two brothers return home at the end of the war to find their family has been kidnapped by Confederate forces.

programme.title: Philadelphia
programme.desc: Emotional powerhouse stars Tom Hanks and Denzel Washington as competing lawyers who sue a prestigious law firm for AIDS discrimination.

programme.title: The Natural
programme.desc: Talent brought him to the edge of glory... Fate took him to the well of despair... and love sent him to the place he was meant to be. A middle-aged unknown comes seemingly out of nowhere to become a legendary baseball player with almost supernatural talent.

programme.title: The Mask Of Zorro
programme.desc: After twenty years as the legendary Zorro, Don Diego (Hopkins) must transform a troubled drifter (Banderas) into the fearless hero he once was.

programme.title: First Men In The Moon
programme.desc: Spectacular adaptation of H. G. Well's novel of adventure and space travel.

programme.title: It Should Happen To You
programme.desc: A publicity-hungry actress uses a Manhattan billboard to jumpstart her career.

programme.title: Cat Ballou
programme.desc: In a spoof of Western pictures, the daughter of a rancher arrives home to find her father living under the threat of being killed unless he sells his ranch to a development corporation. He refuses and is killed. The daughter sends for Kid Shelleen, the hero of several legends, only the gunfighter has become a drunkard, but she teams up with him anyway to right the unjust murder of her father.

programme.title: Bye Bye Birdie
programme.desc: A rock singer travels to a small Ohio town to make his "farewell" television performance and kiss his biggest fan before he is drafted.

programme.title: The Caine Mutiny
programme.desc: A naval lieutenant is court-martialed for seizing command of a minesweeper from a neurotic commander (Humphrey Bogart).

programme.title: The Little Hours
programme.desc: In the Middle Ages, a young servant fleeing from his master takes refuge at a convent full of emotionally unstable nuns. Introduced as a deaf mute man, he must fight to hold his cover as the nuns try to resist temptation.

programme.title: Hearts Beat Loud
programme.desc: A father and daughter form an unlikely songwriting duo in the summer before she leaves for college.

programme.title: The Long Good Friday
programme.desc: An up-and-coming gangster is tested by the insurgence of an unknown, very powerful threat.

programme.title: Before I Go To Sleep
programme.desc: A woman wakes up every day, remembering nothing as a result of a traumatic accident in her past. One day, new terrifying truths emerge that force her to question everyone around her.

programme.title: Communion
programme.desc: Oct. 4 and Dec. 26 the Strieber family drives from NYC to their cabin in the woods. Both nights there are some powerful lights outside and maybe aliens. The dad is mentally affected by the "bad dream", goes to the shrink and is hypnotized.

programme.title: American Fighter
programme.desc: A young wrestler competes in the world of underground fighting to raise money for his ailing mother.

programme.title: Long Gone Heroes
programme.desc: A special forces soldier returns to the field of battle to save his kidnapped niece in South America.

programme.title: Punisher: War Zone
programme.desc: When a gangster is injured by The Punisher, he swears revenge and recruits an army of dangerous men.

programme.title: Sisu
programme.desc: After Nazis steal his gold, an ex-commando will go to outrageous lengths to get it back.

programme.title: American Sicario
programme.desc: The rise and fall of Erik Vasquez, the first American-born drug lord in Mexico.

programme.title: Lone Star Shark
programme.desc: A group of virtual hunters unleash a deadly shark in a Texas lake, causing a young couple to fight for their lives during a peaceful fishing trip in a secluded cove.

programme.title: A Witness to Murder
programme.desc: Sanitation worker MaryBeth is in the wrong place at the wrong time when the mayor's wife is murdered. She refuses to talk to the sheriff she dislikes, but the killers know she was there. Now they're coming for her to make sure she stays silent.

programme.title: Pinkerton
programme.desc: Allan Pinkerton, founder of America's first detective agency, embarks on a mission to capture the notorious outlaw, Jesse James.

programme.title: Lone Star Shark
programme.desc: A group of virtual hunters unleash a deadly shark in a Texas lake, causing a young couple to fight for their lives during a peaceful fishing trip in a secluded cove.

programme.title: Taken From Rio Bravo
programme.desc: Two friends pursue a group of human traffickers that have kidnapped five women in 1874, East Texas.

programme.title: The Gangster, the Cop, the Devil
programme.desc: A vengeful crime boss forms an unlikely partnership with a detective, to catch the elusive serial killer who attacked him.

programme.title: The Flying Swordsman
programme.desc: After two heroes are killed during an outside attempt to steal a hidden fortune, the treasure map inexplicably disappears -- until a decade later when the original eight assassins reemerge only to be challenged by a mysterious swordsman.

programme.title: Gundala
programme.desc: Gundala, who has grown up on the streets, must choose between continuing to look out for himself or doing something about the injustice that surrounds him.

programme.title: The Swordsman
programme.desc: A swordsman who is going blind is forced to raise his sword again to save his daughter, who has been kidnapped by a slave dealer.

programme.title: My Nightmare Office Affair
programme.desc: Lisa seduces Nick in his moment of weakness, hoping to replace his wife.

programme.title: My Mom's Letter From Heaven
programme.desc: A lost letter is found and helps the relationship between a father and daughter.

programme.title: My Life is a Lifetime Movie
programme.desc: Shortly after earning her degree at Northern Kentucky University.

programme.title: My Child Has My Doctor's Face
programme.desc: Jessica discovers that her son's biological father is her fertility doctor.

programme.title: My Nightmare Office Affair
programme.desc: Lisa seduces Nick in his moment of weakness, hoping to replace his wife.

programme.title: My Mom's Letter From Heaven
programme.desc: A lost letter is found and helps the relationship between a father and daughter.

programme.title: You, Me, and that Mountain Retreat
programme.desc: Partnered with nature-hating Nathan, Rebecca is put to the test during a work mountain retreat.

programme.title: How to Win a Prince
programme.desc: A chronically single dating coach attempts to seduce a prince as she helps him navigate the NYC dating scene.

programme.title: Be Mine
programme.desc: A woman finds romance as she prepares to take over her mother's garden store.

programme.title: Driven Underground
programme.desc: Single mom Sarah hides her family in Oregon when her daughter is a witness in a murder against the mob.

programme.title: Campus Caller
programme.desc: When a university student goes missing, her mother a former cop goes in search for her.

programme.title: I'll Be There
programme.desc: More than a decade after distancing herself from her complicated family, Grace's carefully built life is upended when her brother AJ is diagnosed with cancer. As her estranged siblings reunite in Los Angeles, Grace is forced to confront old wounds, buried loyalties, and the role she once played in her fractured family-set against the surreal backdrop of Michael Jackson's death.

programme.title: Take Back
programme.desc: Zara (Gillian White) and Brian (Michael Jai White) are living the perfect small town life when a mysterious stranger from Zara's secret past kidnaps their daughter and now they must race to save her life.

programme.title: Hard Lesson
programme.desc: A Jewish parole officer, Jeff Solomon White, struggles in his new role as a reading teacher for illiterate teens at a New York high school. Raised by African American parents, White sees the situation differently and is motivated to fight for his students, who face an almost certain life of crime and prison.

programme.title: Murder Without Motive
programme.desc: Edmund Perry has everything going for him after he graduates with a scholarship to attend Stanford. With his dedication paying off, an encounter with a police officer senselessly ends his life.

programme.title: Trouble
programme.desc: As Draven faces financial ruin and a serious illness, her marriage to Adam frays. She reconnects with Ceceilius, a wealthy ex, finding comfort in his stability. But as their romance blossoms, Adam’s jealousy spirals into a dangerous obsession, fueled by terrifying dreams and a mysterious woman, Robin. With a wedding on the horizon and secrets unraveling, love and betrayal collide, leading to a shocking conclusion where nothing is as it seems.

programme.title: Something Old
programme.desc: With her wedding days away, Kara agrees to meet her ex, Malik, for what she swears is just one last goodbye. But Malik isn’t looking for closure—he wants her back, and he’s not taking no for an answer. What starts as a simple meetup at a hotel turns into a dangerous game of obsession and control. As Kara’s fiancé Jordan uncovers the truth with help from her maid of honor, time’s running out.

programme.title: Only 48
programme.desc: When Tracy Harris is abducted and held for ransom, her father Keith has only 48 hours to deliver $500,000. Forced back into the criminal world he tried to escape; Keith faces dangerous alliances and hidden truths in order to save his daughter.

programme.title: Vices
programme.desc: Simone, a married woman battling anxiety and the lingering shadow of her past alcoholism, escapes to collect her thoughts. When a storm isolates her in her remote cabin, she’s hunted by two forces: the seductive pull of her past addiction, and a cunning serial killer. Surrounded by a web of lies and sin, Simone must face her inner demons before a literal one ends her life.

programme.title: 100 Million BC
programme.desc: Time-traveling scientists inadvertently bring a giant carnivorous dinosaur back to modern Los Angeles.

programme.title: The Terminators
programme.desc: A small band of resistance fighters battle the cyborgs that have taken control of the planet.

programme.title: Ardennes Fury
programme.desc: ​​As the Battle of the Bulge rages, a U.S. tank unit trapped behind Nazi lines must fight its way back.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.desc: Estes imprisons the captive Talkers and Blends, while Warren and George plan their attack on Altura.

programme.title: Disaster Strike Force
programme.desc: Plummeting temperatures signify the dawn of a new Ice Age.

programme.title: Ape vs. Monster
programme.desc: An ape in space crashes on Earth. Sludge from the ship triggers massive growth in the ape and a gila monster.

programme.title: BODY BAGS (Edited Version)
programme.desc: Body Bags is an anthology horror film made up of three stories bookended by a creepy morgue assistant played by John Carpenter himself. The first story, The Gas Station, features Robert Carradine as a serial killer, with cameos by Sam Raimi and Wes Craven. Hair follows Stacy Keach as he receives a botched hair transplant that infests him with an alien parasite, and Eye is another transplant story, this time featuring Mark Hamill as a baseball player who loses an eye in a car accident and receives a transplant, only to be overtaken with the personality of the eye's previous owner: a murderous misogynist.

programme.title: Camp Cold Brook (Edited Version)
programme.desc: TV producer Jack Wilson (Chad Michael Murray) fears his paranormal reality show will be cancelled. Desperate to increase the ratings, Wilson takes his filming crew out to investigate the legendary Camp Cold Brook--an abandoned summer camp where a mass murder had taken place decades ago. They soon realize they are not alone

programme.title: Hostile
programme.desc: Juliette, a lone survivor of an apocalyptic era, fights to survive against hunger, thirst, a broken leg and strange, disturbing creatures that only come out at nighttime.

programme.title: Don't Kill It (Edited Version)
programme.desc: An ancient demon terrorizes a tiny Mississippi town.

programme.title: Housebound (Edited Version)
programme.desc: Kylie Bucknell, a troubled young woman, attempts to steal the safe from an ATM but the police capture her. Due to her history of recidivism, she is sentenced to house arrest for eight months under the care of her mother, Miriam. Kylie does not get along with either her mother or her stepfather, Graeme. A security contractor, Amos, explains that Kylie's ankle monitor will alert the police if she ever leaves the premises of her mother's house. Kylie is further frustrated when Miriam claims the house is haunted. Amos takes Miriam's suggestion of a haunting seriously and promises to return with ghost-hunting equipment. After a series of unexplained experiences, Kylie comes to believe there may truly be a ghost in the house. Graeme reveals that their home was once a halfway house and the site of a horrific murder. They discover evidence of the crime, including an orthodontic retainer. Amos attempts to break into her neighbor's house next but the neighbor says that he is not the killer. He tells the story of a young savant, Eugene, whom he adopted. Eugene is an expert at mechanics and electronics and disappeared a year before the killing. Kylie discovers Eugene's secret hallways in their house. She and Amos converge at the police station, and Amos corroborates her wild stories of a serial killer living in the hidden passageways. Once Dennis reveals that he wears a retainer, Kylie becomes suspicious of him. When she confronts him he attempts to kill Miriam and Kylie. Kylie and Miriam flee into the secret tunnels, where they encounter Eugene. Realizing that their paranormal activity has been Eugene all this time, they realize that he is friendly. Dennis stabs Eugene, knocks out Kylie, and begins to strangle Miriam. Eugene wakes Kylie and hands her a weapon, which she uses to stab Dennis. Eugene throws a switch, and high voltage explodes Dennis' head. Months later, all have recovered and Eugene has seemingly become an accepted member of the household.

programme.title: The Midnight Man
programme.desc: It was supposed to be just an urban legend... Two teens unleash a demonic force who pits them against their greatest fears and dares them to survive his unholy game. Starring Robert Englund.

programme.title: From Black
programme.desc: A recovering drug addict, saddled by crushing guilt after the disappearance of her young son, is presented with a bizarre offer to learn the truth about what happened and set things right.

programme.title: Mandrake
programme.desc: Mandrake follows probation officer Cathy Madden, who is given the task of rehabilitating notorious killer 'Bloody' Mary Laidlaw back into society after twenty years of jail.

programme.title: V/H/S/99
programme.desc: V/H/S/99 harkens back to the final punk rock analog days of VHS, while taking one giant leap forward into the hellish new millennium. In V/H/S/99, a teenager's home video leads to a series of horrifying revelations. A SHUDDER ORIGINAL

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Family Tree" - Mrs. Drysdale wants to get rid of the Clampetts before the arrival of Mrs. Smith-Standish, the head of a 'first family' historical society. But Mrs. Smith-Standish goes to the Clampetts' first and becomes enchanted with their antiques and way of life, even to roping the horrified Mrs. Drysdale into helping do the chores the old-fashioned way.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Becomes a Banker" - Drysdale hires Jed to be a banker when he needs a crack shot to help beat a rival banker in a skeet shooting competition, but his partner needs to be an employee.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Buys the Freeway" - Henry Jones shows up at the Clampett's, pretends to be an old friend and tries to sell the family the Hollywood Bowl, Griffith Park, and the freeway.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Duke Steals a Wife" - Jed and Duke his dog are both down without a woman in their lives, until they see and pursue a French woman and her poodle that she brought to breed with Mrs. Drysdales dog. Meanwhile Mrs. Drysdale has arranged a "marriage" between the dogs, complete with a decorated bedroom.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Plays Solomon" - Granny can't stand Pearl's yodeling so she reports her to the police. When one of the officers takes Pearl out, Granny thinks she got Pearl in trouble and becomes sad and contrite. Meanwhile, the police find her still, and new trouble results.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Throws a Wingding" - Flatt and Scruggs and their wives come to visit their old sweetheart, but Pearl thinks they're there to propose. Jed throws a wingding for them and the duo play music for the Clampetts.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Elly's Animals" - When Pearl starts selling music lessons, Mrs. Drysdale complains about the noise to the police. Mrs. Drysdale also calls the dog catcher on Duke.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Saves Drysdale's Marriage" - Mrs Drysdale leaves for a health farm saying Mr. Drysdale is "going to have a new wife," while Mr. Drysdale tells Cousin Pearl he'd like her to keep his house. However, the Clampett's think he's wanting to marry Pearl, so Jed comes up with a plan to "save" the Drysdale's marriage.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed's Dilemma" - Grannie and Cousin Pearl are at each other's throats over who's going to take care of cooking and the house, so Jed has to find ways to keep them apart.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Rescues Pearl" - Since Mr. Brewster doesn't want to get married, but since the whole county knows that Cousin Pearl had her hat set for him, Jed comes up with a plan for her to save face by having Mr. Brewster proposed in public and then have her turn him down. Jed didn't count on Mr. Brewster's background in the theater and him making a huge production out of it.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "No Place Like Home" - Back home for Christmas, Elly May bonds with her old animal friends, while Pearl plays the piano for the "new" movie in town (the silent version of Ben Hur) to impress Mr. Brewster.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Home for Christmas" - Jed, Ellie May, Jethro and Granny take their first plane flight back home for Christmas to visit cousin Pearl, who is busy cooking up a feast to win Mr. Brewster's unwilling heart.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Great Feud" - Granny and the rest of the Clampetts start a feud with the Drysdales since Sonny courted Elly May and then stood her up when granny suggested marriage.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Elly Races Jetherine" - When Sonny Drysdale promises to give Elly May a ring, Granny thinks he's going to propose and becomes a matchmaker. Cousin Pearl can't stand the idea that Elly May will get married before Jethrine, so she sets to matchmaking Jethrine with Jasper Depew.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Pygmalion and Elly" - Sonny Drysdale decides he needs to be Pygmalion to Elly's Galatea and remake her from a hillbilly into a woman of society, while Granny uses love charms to heat up their relationship.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas seeks an escape when he's captured by outlaws while seeking help for an injured Mark.

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An Englishman arrives with a custom-made rifle and a plan to kill Lucas.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Len Richards and his brother, Ab, confront a Lucas McCain look-alike, Earl Bantry and his sidekick K.C. Peters, for slaughtering one of Richards' steers.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark and Milly are shocked when Lucas begins gambling. They don't know that Lucas is "undercover" trying to catch a man cheating.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark befriends singer-banjoist Lafayette Bly, a blind man with an acute sense of hearing and a very strong grip.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A retired lawman's irrational jealousy threatens not only to destroy his marriage but also to make him an easy target for someone who wants him dead.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: No one is more surprised than Micah when newcomer Leota Carraway claims he's her long-lost husband and the father of her child.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas is torn by conflicting emotions when he meets the town's new preacher, a former outlaw whom the Rifleman vowed to kill.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A handsome gambler moves into town and begins wooing Milly Scott, claiming to have known her deceased brother.

programme.title: A Lawless Street
programme.desc: A lawman moves from town to town in the Colorado Territory, ridding each of its outlaws.

programme.title: The Great Sioux Massacre
programme.desc: A look at what happened to Custer and his troops at the Battle of Little Big Horn.

programme.title: The Man From Laramie
programme.desc: A soldier's quest to avenge his brother's death pits him against an aging cattle baron and his psychotic son.

programme.title: The Blazing Trail
programme.desc: Charles Starrett is the Durango Kid. He is also the marshal, Steve Allan. When Robert Malcolm, a wealthy old land mogul, is killed, the finger points at Steve Darrell and Gaylord Pendleton, Malcolm's siblings.

programme.title: Daring Danger
programme.desc: Tim McCoy is nearly killed in a fight with Alexander. He recovers and goes after the bad man, catching up to him and finding that he has taken up with a rustler. Of course, McCoy now has to go after the rustler, too. The film is based on a story by William Colt MacDonald.

programme.title: Frontier Justice
programme.desc: Hoot Gibson is back! But he never imagined he'd find his father in an insane asylum and his cattle ranch overrun with sheep! Worst of all, Roger Williams stars as the diabolical James WIlton, a rival who isn't above murder. For trivia buffs: Director Robert F. McGowan was the man behind several of the classic Our Gang comedies...

programme.title: Young Buffalo Bill
programme.desc: Roy Rogers stars in this highly fictionalized account of Bill Cody's life from director Joseph Kane (Dakota, Flame of Barbary Coast). What it lacks in accuracy is made up for with adventure, as well as and some of Roy's great cowboy songs, including 'Blow Breeze Blow', and 'Rollin' Down to Santa Fe'. Other stars include George 'Gabby' Hayes, Chief Thundercloud, and the lovely Pauline Moore (Young Mr. Lincoln, Charlie Chan at Treasure Island)

programme.title: Buffalo Stampede
programme.desc: A big time cast, including Randolph Scott, Buster Crabbe, Barton MacLane, and Harry Carey star in this feature about stampedes, Indian attacks, and plundering thieves! Directed by the esteemed Henry Hathaway (True Grit, Niagara).

programme.title: Captain Apache (Edited Version)
programme.desc: After Harry T. Collier, a beloved commissioner of Indian Affairs, is murdered in late March during the1880s, Captain Apache, an Indian graduate of West Point, is assigned by the army to investigate the crime. Suspecting that O.J., the sheriff of a town bordering the reservation may be involved in the killing, Apache travels there and finds the sheriff dining with his mistress Maude at the Paradise Saloon. Before Apache can question him, however, O.J. abruptly departs and rides out of town with Apache in pursuit. When Apache apprehends him, O.J. swears that he did not kill Collier and relates that the agents dying words were April Morning. Meanwhile, Griffin, a wealthy landowner and six of his henchmen deliver guns across the border to a corrupt Mexican general who is bent on overtaking the province by force. When Griffin then demands that the general now fulfill his part of the bargain, the general orders him killed, unaware that his lieutenant, Sanchez is in Griffins employ. Rather than killing Griffin, Sanchez shoots the general, and after promoting himself to the post, promises Griffin that he will cross the border in time for April Morning. When O.J. is found murdered, Apache questions Maude, who reveals that O.J. traveled to a Mexican cantina monthly. Apache then rides to the cantina, where he is met by a cavalry patrol led by Sgt. ORourke. Upon learning that the cantina owner has recently been killed, Apache demands that the mans widow, Rosita, take him to Rodriguez, her husbands employer. Rosita then introduces Apache to a Mexican sergeant who allegedly knows where Rodriguez can be found. Unaware that the sergeant is Rodriguez disguised as a soldier, Apache follows him to a church where the priest claims that Rodriguez has claimed sanctuary and is therefore immune to the law.

programme.title: West of the Divide
programme.desc: John Wayne stars as Ted Hayden, a tough hombre who goes undercover to join a gang led by a heartless fiend known only as Mr. Gentry (Lloyd Whitlock). Gentry is out to take over a ranch belonging to one of Hayden's friends, but as Hayden finds out, Gentry has a lot more than that up his sleeve. You'll have to watch this two-fisted Western to find out the rest!

programme.title: The Legend of the Lone Ranger
programme.desc: The Butch Cavendish gang ambushes a group of Texas Rangers, killing all but one. The surviving ranger is nursed back to health by Native American Tonto, and takes on the identity of a masked vigilante, determined to bring all outlaws to justice. Culled from episodes of the popular TV series, this feature is great fun for fans of the Lone Ranger. Starring Clayton Moore and Jay Silverheels.

programme.title: Lost Canyon
programme.desc: When Johnny Travers (Jay Kirby) is falsely accused of robbing a bank, it's up to Hopalong Cassidy (William Boyd) to clear his name and find the real villains. There's nothing better than watching Hoppy get rough with the rustlers, and it's all the better when you get to hear the Sportsmen Quartette sing (I got Spurs) Jingle, Jangle, Jingle.

programme.title: Doc Holliday
programme.desc: Doc Holliday runs a small dental practice in rural Georgia when he is visited by Wyatt Earp and offered a chance to become a United States Deputy. All Doc has to do is capture the Bridle Brothers - two of most notorious outlaws the West has ever seen. The Doc sets out on an adventure like none other to find these hardened criminals and ends up forging a friendship with Wyatt Earp that would carry into the events of Tombstone.

programme.title: Jesse James
programme.desc: Jesse James and his brother Frank race to secure the family's buried gold as members of the James-Younger gang attempt to steal it.

programme.title: Taken From Rio Bravo
programme.desc: Two friends pursue a group of human traffickers that have kidnapped five women in 1874, East Texas.

programme.title: Broken Arrow
programme.desc: For a decade, the white settlers and the Apaches have been engaged in a bloody war with no peaceful end in sight. When a white scout, Tom Jeffords (James Stewart), has a dangerously close but enlightening encounter with the natives, he begins to see the humanity in these enemies. Entering the Apache territory seeking peace, Jeffords forms a friendship with the Apache leader Cochise (Jeff Chandler), although there are people on both sides who resist extending the olive branch.

programme.title: The Undefeated
programme.desc: Unaware that the Civil War has ended, Col. John Henry Thomas (John Wayne) successfully attacks a Confederate company led by James Langdon (Rock Hudson). With the remnants of Langdon's squadron fleeing to Mexico, Thomas and his adopted Native American son, Blue Boy (Roman Gabriel), gather a herd of horses and head for the border with their company, to sell them. After Langdon's caravan is captured by a Mexican general (Tony Aguilar), Thomas nobly sacrifices the horses to free them.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: With new places on the calendar, over 16 stages, broadcasting in over 100 countries and in its 13th year, the MLO Strongman Champions League (SCL) can be seen truly as the biggest strongman league in the world. This competition in Portugal is full of memorable performances and strong results and this is the final!

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The spectacular Fefor Arena hosted for the 8th time the Worlds Strongest Viking, part of the SCL World Series. But with the absence of former title holders its anyones game. Again, a very spectacular episode of the Strongman Champions League here in Norway.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: In this episode, the Titan, former double World champion from Latvia will compete against his fellow countryman and the current World champion - Aivars Smaukstelis. With 8 events over 2 stages the contestants are pushed to their limits in Finland.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Dainis Zageris and Aivars Smaukstelis, both from Latvia have a serious, strong battle in the this second and final episode of the SCL Finland 2020. Watch the unbelievable and brute power of these athletes in the last 4 events to crown the winner.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The SCL Germany event takes place in an ancient castle called Die Burg in the heart of Germany. Its here where 5 world record attempts take place across 5 different events with 10 athletes. They will go to the max! See this and much more in the SCL Germany 2020.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: For the first time in over 10 years back in Estonia, in Tartu. 12 of the Strongest athletes in the world will fight here for the title and the overall world championship points. You will see 5 crazy events, such as: Boat Pull, Viking Press, Medley, Conan's Wheel and a very heavy Power Stairs!

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: SCL Norway is normally all about snow, wind, and cold weather. Our brave athletes are used to compete under conditions few other athletes have competed in, but after COVID delays the competition has been moved from winter to summer bringing in a whole new range of challenges. With an impressive athlete list who will be the winner across 5 cruel events?

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Were in sunny Finland for the next stage of a double-bill of SCL action, but this time its a team event. A truly fantastic event with 6000 spectators. Even during COVID times this was exceptional! 8 Strong Teams where fighting for the title over a crazy 9 events.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Bean Week reaches its triumphant finale as Clinton Kelly makes a Chickpea Pasta and Chocolate Chip Cookies while a special musical surprise celebrates Carla Hall's lifelong dream of being honored Broadway-style. The hosts reflect on Bean Week's unexpected viral success and welcome a composer to help mark the occasion.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Michael Symon makes Super Bowl Smash Burgers inspired by Carla Hall's hilarious hotel window-smashing incident the night before, breaking down his technique for maximum crust, cheese lace, and game-day efficiency. The hosts debate double-bun etiquette, share tips on underrated herbs, and tackle fan questions about making the most of a large Parmesan wedge.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Michael Symon kicks off Super Bowl week ó his unambiguously favorite week of the year ó by making Smash Burgers with crispy seared edges, while Carla Hall makes Ham and Cheese Croquettes with sweet chili Doritos for extra crunch. Guest Josh Capon brings his expert restaurant energy to the game day kitchen.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Super Bowl week continues as Carla Hall makes her show-stopping Baked Brie wrapped in flaky puff pastry with honey and nuts, which Clinton defends as the real MVP of any game day spread. The hosts debate the ideal balance between indulgent party food and something a little elegant, and share their best game day hosting strategies.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Valentine's Day week launches with Carla Hall making an Easy Chicken Curry that she considers the perfect romantic dinner: warming, aromatic, and impressive without being stressful. The hosts debate whether cooking for a date should feel effortless or theatrical and share their own most romantic food memories.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly makes his legendary Sexy Time Chicken for Valentine's Day, a dish he swears exudes confidence, intention, and genuine romance with every bite. Guest Devyn Simone joins to share relationship etiquette wisdom, and the hosts explore what makes food truly feel romantic beyond just the recipe itself.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Amanda Freitag joins Clinton Kelly, Carla Hall, and Michael Symon for the Valentine's Day week finale, making a romantic pasta dish that inspires Michael to quote an Italian chef who calls the vigorous mixing of pasta 'the sound of love.' The hosts celebrate food as the ultimate love language and toast to the week with warmth, humor, and fresh pasta.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: A special compilation episode looking back at the best Chew It or Screw It moments from the past six months, featuring some of the show's most memorable guests playing along as the hosts ask them to weigh in on food, lifestyle, and totally random preferences. Segments include: Danielle Sepsy (the Scone Queen) forced to choose between scones and muffins—predictably choosing scones—plus her takes on stuffing vs. mashed potatoes and canned vs. homemade cranberry sauce; Liz Symon (Michael's wife) on orange wine, foofy cocktails, lazy sundaes, the New York Times Spelling Bee app (Queen Bee 99% of the time), stinky cheese, and the truth about cuddling with Michael; Marysol Castro on Citi Field hot dogs, pineapple on pizza (a hard Bronx no), and celebrity cameos at sporting events (the exception being Bad Bunny); Amanda Freitag and the crew on going out to eat on Valentine's Day (screw it—you get the worst service and cooks who rarely go out); Devyn Simone on cooking for someone on a first date (surprisingly chew it, as long as boundaries are established) and not texting the next day after getting lucky; Esther Choi on breakfast for dinner, ketchup on eggs (a unanimous screw it from the entire panel); Scott Conant on sending food back at a restaurant (screw it—you're an adult, figure it out), family style with strangers (chew it), and splitting the check 12 ways; Damaris Phillips on cornbread with sugar, Miracle Whip with bologna, and the boat-ride romance that made her appreciate Miracle Whip on a sandwich; Maneet Chauhan on spicy desserts, taking the last bite when sharing a dish (chew it if you're single and looking for a partner), and eating off someone else's plate; Mika Leon on the five-second rule, helicopter parenting, staying up 24 hours to cook (chew it—she did 32-plus hours on a cooking competition), and going to the club (hard pass, she's tired); and Chef Jackie Bula on air fryers (screw it—just fry), and reality cooking competitions (screw it—it's less about the food than the show). Audience engagement prompts woven throughout invite viewers to comment on their own chew-it-or-screw-it takes.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: On Father's Day, Michael Symon and Clinton Kelly are joined by social media cooking sensation Ereka Vetrini to create quick, delicious dishes perfect for summer entertaining. Vetrini, who built a massive following on TikTok and Instagram during the pandemic, shares her approach to accessible Italian-inspired cooking. The episode features two recipes: roasted red pepper bruschetta with Calabrian chili mayo and a perfectly seared 20-minute tuna steak topped with a caper-shallot relish. Between cooking segments, the hosts discuss parenting, picky eaters, navigating social media criticism, and the importance of real food over processed trends. Vetrini shares her philosophy that cooking at home is about making people feel loved and special.

programme.title: Simply Symons
programme.desc: In this episode of Simply Symons, hosts Michael Symon and Liz Symon, joined by Liv Annacone, bring the show indoors to cook during warm weather. Michael creates an elevated crab grilled cheese sandwich using mascarpone, jumbo lump crab meat, Old Bay seasoning, tarragon mustard, and pickled red onions, with parmigiano-reggiano crust for extra crispness. Meanwhile, Liz prepares an orange whip cocktail with a modern twist, substituting tangerine juice for traditional orange juice and combining vodka, rum, Grand Marnier, and heavy cream. The episode showcases kitchen techniques like gentle folding to preserve crab lumps and discusses alternative grilled cheese fillings, while celebrating nostalgic Cleveland dining memories and mall culture.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly replaces cooking with a March Madness-style bracket tournament for boxed brownie mixes, staging eight brands in head-to-head blind taste tests to crown an ultimate winner. After an epic series of eliminations, Duncan Hines Double Fudge emerges victorious at just $4.29 a box.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Jackie Bakula, beloved as Sparkles to Chewed Up fans, returns to the kitchen as a guest host while Carla Hall is away filming the Today Show, bringing her warm, professional energy and joining Michael Symon and Clinton Kelly for a celebratory cooking episode full of affection for the show.

programme.title: The Dave Chang Cooking Show
programme.desc: Dave turns the tables on Kat and John, as he cooks a special meal for the married couple behind the sensational LA-based restaurant Yangban Society.

programme.title: Ying Cooks the Internet
programme.desc: "Ratatouille Tarte Tatin" - Chris Ying creates a beautiful ratatouille tarte Tatin, motivated by a combination of online influences, including an on-the-fly challenge from his buddy David Chang while they were making chicken pot pie together in a different video. Chris riffs on the popular trend zipping around social media to make tarte Tatin (typically a sweet pastry) while paying homage to recipe YouTuber extraordinaire, Andrew Rea (Binging with Babish), who's first mega-popular video was recreating the ratatouille from...Ratatouille.

programme.title: Ying Cooks the Internet
programme.desc: "WTF is BORG and Can a Mixologist Make it Good?" - Professional bartender, mixologist and author, John deBary, joins Chris Ying to figure out why all the college kids are going bonkers over a viral drink trend called BORG (Black Out Rage Gallon). Yikes! Is it any good? Are the kids maybe onto something here? Can John come up with a recipe that elevates it from the bottom shelf to...a slightly higher shelf? We feel old.

programme.title: Ying Cooks the Internet
programme.desc: "A Complete Christmas Roast Beef Dinner" - The internet is full of people advertising their recipes for affordable! simple! budget-buster! Christmas dinners. But just because you want to save some money and not break your back making dinner doesn't mean you don't want something festive and celebratory. Chris Ying is here to light the way to a full Christmas dinner—roast beef, horseradish cream, creamed spinach, baked potatoes, Yorkshire pudding—for under $50. Nothing hacky or gimmick-y about it. Just a good old-fashioned heart-warming holiday dinner from Colonel Christmas himself.

programme.title: Cooking School
programme.desc: "Hetty McKinnon's Eggplant Mapo" - Hetty McKinnon, an Australian Chinese cookbook author and James Beard Award finalist, stops by the studio to show Chris Ying how to make her Eggplant Mapo—a delicious twist on Mapo Tofu.

programme.title: Cooking School
programme.desc: "Invitation to a Banquet: A Conversation with Fuchsia Dunlop" - Step into the vibrant world of Chinese cuisine with acclaimed author and culinary adventurer, Fuchsia Dunlop, as she unveils the flavors and stories behind her latest book, "Invitation to a Banquet." Dunlop stops by the Majordomo Media studio to chat with Chris Ying to discuss her lastest literary achivement and some perspectives from her 30+ years of studying Sichuan food and Chinese cuisine.

programme.title: Cooking School
programme.desc: "Pork and Chive Dumplings with Chris Ying" - Chris Ying has made a lot of dumplings in his day. In fact, he always keeps a batch in the freezer for whenever the kids need a quick dinner. Today, he shares his go-to pork dumpling recipe, including two quick sauces.

programme.title: Cooking School
programme.desc: "David Chang Shares 3 Quick and Easy Recipes: Meatballs, Braised Chicken and 'Hugo' Pasta" - Dave cooks up three of his easiest, go-to recipes that are all endlessly riffable, can be prepped ahead and frozen, and make good use of some clever microwave techniques. Pork meatballs over pasta, braised chicken, and "Hugo" pastaâ€”a delicious twist on pesto pasta that kids love.

programme.title: Cooking School
programme.desc: "Dave Arnold's Mom's Stuffing (your new go-to holiday recipe)" - We're excited to share this insane, soon-to-be-family-standard recipe from our good friend, Dave Arnold, who is admittedly is still trying to figure this out from his own mom's recipe. This is THE. ACTUAL. DAVE. ARNOLD. filming himself making the aforementioned famous stuffing with some of our flourishes of text and music. I mean...this is it. Nobody, including Dave Arnold, knows how long to cook it or at what temperature you should cook it at, but we're confident if you're still reading this, you're going to do just fine.

programme.title: Cooking School
programme.desc: "A THANKSGIVING MIRACLE! David Chang and Friends Make a FULL Thanksgiving Dinner in 2 hours?!?!" - David Chang is joined by Chris Ying and Chris Bianco while they attempt to make an entire Thanksgiving dinner in less than 2 hours...no cuts, no tricks. Just people cooking, cussin', starting things on fire, and having a (mostly) nice time. Hey, it's the holidays...we're all miserable.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Chino-Latino originated with Chinese laborers who immigrated to Cuba, Trinidad, and elsewhere in the Caribbean to work the plantations. They developed a unique mashup of Asian and West Indian cooking—the subject of today’s show. Get ready for tangerine teriyaki chicken, butter rum grilled plantains, smoky baby back ribs with guava barbecue sauce, and Korean brisket tacos.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Steinhatchee, Florida, with seafood-rich grilling of the Gulf Coast. Blackened redfish that we’ll prepare “on the half shell”, to the Florida shrimp boil, deconstructed and flame-charred on the grill. And, yes, there will be oysters and clams—invigorated by the sweet scent of wood smoke. Explore one of the most colorful coastal regions in North America.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Today, we’re grilling green with vegetables we love like asparagus, corn, and mushrooms. Celebrate meatless grilling in all its verdant glory. From a new egg salad with grilled fresh hearts of palm, to a squash, black bean, and queso fresco pizza you grill directly over the fire. And grilled cheese with portobello mushrooms served in a swirl of blazing cognac.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: How about upping your grill game with steaks you may not be familiar with, such as secreto or spinalis dorsi? Secreto is a hyper-flavorful steak cut from a hog’s belly with a grilled vegetable sauce, romesco. Spinalis dorsi the most delectable part of a rib roast reborn as a steak, and grilled with bourbon. And grill a brisket steak fragrant with sizzling shallot sage butter.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: In today’s show, Texas barbecue meets Mexican spice as we explore how American barbecue techniques can enhance three classic Mexican dishes: snapper in pipian in a grilled vegetable and pumpkin seed sauce, pork shoulder pibil smoke-roasted in banana leaves, and a Project Fire first, a dessert quesadilla lavished with bananas and dulce de leche.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Brisket is simultaneously the easiest and hardest meat to barbecue. Today’s show is all about brisket, complete with failproof methods for smoking it right every time. From not so traditional Texas barbecue and a distinctive bacon-smoked brisket flat to an electrifying Vietnamese brisket salad. You’ll even learn how to make breakfast-worthy Tex-Mex brisket tacos.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Diane goes off the beaten path to lush Mt. Pelion in Central Greece in search of ways to preserve nature's bounty. Preserves of every kind are the starting point for so many dishes here, from whole apples and almonds put up in sugar syrup to wild pistachio shoots pickled in vinegar. Discover the Greek tradition of sweet and savory preserves that pays homage to Greece's incredible produce.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Diane follows the fillo flake trail from a New York City diner to the remote Greek countryside to explore the origins of fillo pies. Find out how to use fillo as a base for an array of dishes, both savory and sweet.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Diane celebrates the intensely flavored food and unique wines of one of Greece's most breathtaking islands, Santorini. Diane hops in a boat to pick capers on this volcanic island. She visits a renowned vineyard which still practices the island tradition of growing grapes in basket-shaped vines. Enjoy the tastes of Santorini with ingredients from field to sea.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Diane explores the meze tradition of small plates of vibrant food meant to be shared. She uncovers the vast variety and robust flavors of the meze table and invites a wine expert into the kitchen for advice on what to pair when the meal includes spice, yogurt, cheese, crunch, comfort, seafood, meat and more, all in one sitting. Discover the fun and festive meze tradition.

programme.title: Lidia's Kitchen
programme.desc: Lidia believes in cooking according to season, and when springtime comes, she and her family all work together to create a beautiful garden. In this episode, she shares four recipes that celebrate the bounty of the summertime garden: Tuna Salad with Boiled Zucchini, String Bean Salad with Capers and Basil, Whole Wheat Couscous with Cucumbers, and finally Shells with Chicken and Zucchini.

programme.title: Lidia's Kitchen
programme.desc: Today, Lidia serves a beautiful Striped Bass with Tomato Pesto over a bed of fennel as the star of the meal. She then creates a tasty dish of Mint String Beans. For dessert, summer is still the theme with Peach Granita, although the granita technique can be made with all kinds of seasonal fruits.

programme.title: Lidia's Kitchen
programme.desc: Lidia creates a Tomato and Mint Salad, Tomato and Ricotta Crostini, and Spaghetti with Quick Pantry Sauce, before finishing with a Gluttonous Tomato - a perfect appetizer or lunch dish.

programme.title: Lidia's Kitchen
programme.desc: It's all about fresh seafood in this episode with three of Lidia's most requested fish recipes: Clam Bruschetta features crusty Italian bread, still warm from the grill with clam sauce; Halibut Baked with Mushrooms in a Lemon and White Wine Sauce is a great weeknight meal as is Grouper with Potatoes and Peppers.

programme.title: Lidia's Kitchen
programme.desc: Lidia creates a seasonal meal that says 'Family Time'. Pork and grapes are a natural combination, and in today's menu she prepares Pork Medallions with Grapes; Baked Fennel with Sage and for dessert, a colorful and perfect cold weather Orange in Marsala for dessert.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A man is arrested at a popular theme park for public intoxication. A detainee swallows his earring during processing. Officers attempt to restrain a combative woman in custody.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A woman who says she’s called “Sunshine” has less than a sunny disposition. A man ditches a halfway house for jail to get his life in order. programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: Toting his guitar, an inmate serenades the officers. One man protests his arrest and states that having cocaine is not a crime. A man claims to be an Iraqi War Veteran and challenges his detainment.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A man believes he is an alien wrongfully arrested for obstruction. Claiming to be a law school student, a man just doesn’t understand why he was arrested for trespassing. programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: We follow the men and women of LVMPD as they do their best to tame the New Year's Eve festivities up and down the Las Vegas Strip.

programme.title: Jail

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A young father pulls a desperate double robbery to make ends meet. A routine shakedown gets deadly when officers uncover alarming contraband. programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A ladies' man smuggles women's underwear into jail. A woman arrested at a traffic accident is incredulous to discover that smoking marijuana while driving is against the law. A young man charged with a DUI tells guards he fears he may become pregnant behind bars.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: An intoxicated woman clashes with officers but later shows that good behavior pays off. An experienced prostitute gives solid advice to a younger woman and begs her to get out of the “game.” An angry woman smashes her cheating boyfriend’s windshield.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A man attacks a medical officer and officers rush to intervene. After destroying a tree and unleashing pigeons, a woman is arrested. Unease is caused by a man’s menacing glare during his booking.

programme.title: Jail

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A man attempts to eat marijuana in jail. The Special Detention Unit investigates forbidden letters hidden amongst inmates. A bloody, vicious brawl escalates between an imprisoned duo.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A man claims royal lineage during a combative booking process. After resisting officers and harboring a vicious animal, a man is arrested. Later, intoxicated individuals create havoc for officers.

programme.title: The Bumble Nums - Super Simple Collection 1
programme.desc: Once Humble, Grumble, and Stumble make it to their kitchen with ingredient intact, it's time to make the dish.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: For Children's Day, Wang Min's Dad has invited his son and his classmates to visit his toy factory. While cleaning up before the visit, a robot toy goes on a rampage. The Super Pets encounter an itchy lion at a sanctuary in South Africa. Jett and Astra deliver a back scratcher, but the lion's itchiness is stronger than they realized!

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: The Super Pets go into a video game arcade and play a video game called Dessert Kingdom. They are watched by a boy named Yoonho and they decide to go into the game itself. When the Super Pets unearth a woolly mammoth, a Nenets boy wants to keep it. The mammoth must be able to pull a sleigh so Jett and Dizzy deliver a mammoth size sleigh.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: When a T-Rex skeleton on display in a Copenhagen museum is brought to life, a boy orders a remote controller to summon a giant robot T-Rex that he built to help calm it. Jett and the others arrive in the Jurassic Period to return Tyranno to her proper place in time. A volcano erupts throwing fireballs everywhere and causing a dinosaur stampede.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: The Super Pets spend a day at a Pet Hotel in Dubai, United Arab Emirates. The daughter of the hotel owner gets help from the Super Wings to keep them well behaved. After the Jet Pets' Mini Base collides with a small comet, Jett and Astra rush a space scanner to a young boy and together and the three search space for the small 'Baba' comet.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: It's Jett's birthday and almost all of his friends are throwing him a big birthday party! Sky sends Donnie, Paul, and Dizzy out on missions and nobody is left at Jett's party. When the truck transporting race cars gets lost, Jett, Jerome and Dizzy show up in Monza, Italy to take part in a very special Super Wings race against Golden Boy.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: While in Thailand, Jett Pet and Paul Pet's fruit is swiped by a monkey. Thanawat asks for help getting his toys back so they create an LED ball with a tracking system. The Super Pets travel to Madrid, Spain where they help a boy secure a case for his pet tarantula to ride the train. However an accident causes his tarantula to become super-sized!

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: After eating Super Pets' trick chocolates, Jett can only move very slowly. An emergency call comes in from a young girl in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia, who needs an ice maker delivered. When the Super Pets discover an erupting underwater volcano, a girl orders a megaphone to alert all the villagers fishing in the water. However, they don't listen to her warnings.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: The Super Pets are on World Aircraft to help Jett give some kids a tour. After Storm demonstrates how the package printer works, two packages get mixed up. The Super Pets travel to Tokyo, Japan where they help the Paper Rangers repair an Origami Robot for an action movie. Afterward, they get asked to be ACTORS in the movie!

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: The Super Pets encounter mermaid students learning to befriend fish in Cebu, Philippines. Jett and Jerome deliver a microphone and speaker to a girl who wants to sing with them. The Super Pets meet a girl in Paris whose greatest wish is to go to the top of the Eiffel Tower. The elevator cannot run due to an expected storm so Jett and Donnie deliver a tram.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Storm and Stella search for Jett and Donnie after the two Super Wings disappear in thin air. Astra locates their whereabouts - they're in Paris, 1889! While exploring Osaka, Japan, the Super Pets accidentally rip a boy's koinobori for the Children's Day Festival. Jett and Dizzy deliver a huge koinobori for him.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: The Super Pets meet a boy and his giant robot on Jeju Island in South Korea. Before a typhoon comes, Taehoon needs to help his father harvest all the tangerines on their farm. When a little girl and her Dad accidentally fall in an Incan secret dark room, Jett, and Ellie show up in Machu Picchu, Peru, to take part in a historical rescue mission.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: When the Super Pets arrive at Ha Long, Vietnam, they meet a boy who wants to take his pet snail on a walk but the snail is too slow. So the boy asks for a snail size skateboard. The Super Pets go to Germany where they participate in a water fight. They accidentally shoot Mona's necklace. Jett and Astra deliver a magnifying glass to find the missing bead.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: When the Super Pets accidentally break a boulder on the roof of a house in Monsanto, Portugal, a girl orders tape to stick it back together. Golden Boy tries to outshine them. The Super Pets' Mini Base accidentally gets tangled up in an octopus kite, pulling it to the ground and destroying it. The Super Wings deliver paper and string to make a new kite.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett and Marty, with their new electric powers, save an amusement park in Germany. Jett and Dizzy also rescue a boat, an eel, and fix a jaguar chase, making everyone happy.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: In Singapore, Jett and Lucie use electric powers to shrink Happy the giant robot dog. In Paris, Jett and Marty turn a giant baguette into a train to deliver it to a festival.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett and Traver time-travel to uncover a dinosaur footprint’s creator. Jett and Dizzy rescue a bus stuck in a ditch using Monster Truck Tires, getting the kids to school on time.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett and Tino retrieve a mood lamp from mammoths after a Stone Age detour, delivering it to LA. In Cairo, Jett and Sally restore order after Golden Girl's magic animates the Sphinx.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: From the moment babies are born, they use their developing senses to discover the world. In terms of sight, bold patterns in contrasting colors or black and white are initially preferred. As for sounds, Mother s gentle voice, in any language, is music to baby's ears. Language Nursery: Voices From Many Lands acquaints your baby with the sounds of foreign language by presenting delightful, visually stimulating images accompanied by spoken passages, natural sounds and music.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As each day passes, babies' awareness of the world around them -- and all the wonders it holds -- continues to develop. Wild animals are especially intriguing and World Animals captures the spirtit of little ones' fascination with wild creatures as it introduces them to animals living in the jungle, in the ocean, and on the savannah.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Baby's innate curiosity about all they see and hear increases on a daily basis. Before long, they begin to associate words with objects and to imitate and articulate sounds. Why not give their eyes and ears something wonderful to feast upon? Baby Shakespeare presents little ones with 12 common words that can be found within the rich context of classic poems and the beauty of nature.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Babies love animals, and now you can bring animals from the seven continents home to your baby. Meet dozens of exotic animals including Asian pandas, Australian kangaroos and Arctic snow monkeys...all filmed in their beautiful, natural habitats. Rhythms and songs inspired by faraway lands have been orchestrated especially for little ears and encourage your baby to sing, dance and play to the world beats. You'll laugh together at the funny puppet shows featuring moms and their baby animals.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: World Music introduces you and your little one to beautiful sounds from every continent, bringing a fresh, new experience of music and culture. Sing, dance and play to exotic rhythms that open the door to an appreciation of different cultures from around the world.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Set off on a fun-filled "field trip" with your baby to discover animals found at the park, on the farm, and in your own backyard.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Learn about the numbers 1,2,3,4 & 5 through rhyme, real-life footage, counting, stories, and repetition - accompanied by classical music and real world imagery.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Ocean Explorers
programme.desc: Cal, Neptune, Opus, Dean, Tinker and others learn about the flora and fauna of the ocean through STEAM-based principles and real-life footage.

programme.title: The Sandbox
programme.desc: The Sandbox is where our favorite Baby Einstein characters gather to play, problem-solve and have fun. Each five-minute episode explores an area of curiosity relevant to our 2-4 year old audience. Since the four weathered planks of wood that make up the structure of their sandbox are no obstacles for their imaginations, the entire universe is available to them for each new adventure.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Join our playful puppet host, Bard the Dragon, on a fun-filled adventure using everyday words such as flower, cat, and moon, and beautiful scenery from nature. World Of Words lets you and your little one share the excitement of discovering new words together!

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Within the first year of babies' lives, their physical development begins to kick into high gear as they explore ways to physically interact with the world around them. BABY'S FIRST MOVES is a joyful celebration of their movement milestones -- including first steps, clapping, jumping, dancing and more.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As babies grow, their eye-hand coordination begins to improve as their ability to interact with their surroundings blossoms. It is the perfect time for My First Signs, A playful introduction to 20 common words and phrases from baby's world -- including ''mommy'', ''daddy'' and ''I love you'' -- both Spoken and in Sign Language.

programme.title: Bob the Train - Non Stop
programme.desc: Kids educational songs and nursery rhymes that your little one will love! Come join bob the train as he sings, dances in this fun kids learning video. Learn about alphabets, fruits, planets, phonics, numbers, abc, shapes, colors, 123 and more made easy and fun with this preschool rhymes and kids songs playlist.

programme.title: Bob the Train - Halloween Videos For Kids
programme.desc: Come celebrate halloween with your friend Bob the Train!

programme.desc: Enjoy Bob the Train Finger Family and popular easy to learn nursery rhymes for babies and toddlers, which the children love to sing and dance along with. Learn these kids songs and new words at the same time.

programme.title: Bob The Train Shorts- Stories for Kids
programme.desc: Bob the Train is a fun-loving, curious & inquisitive cartoon train. He loves to teach through stories and educational cartoon kids videos. Come enjoy Bob shorts filled with music, kids songs & baby videos.

programme.desc: Bob the Train is a fun-loving, curious & inquisitive cartoon train. He loves to teach through stories and educational cartoon kids videos. Come watch Bob shorts filled with music, kids songs & baby videos.

programme.desc: Bob the Train one of kids favorite characters showcases and stars in a fun series that focusses on children learning Colors, Shapes, ABC, Numbers and more with the help of surprise eggs, soccer balls and cars. Happy Learning Kids!

programme.title: Bath Song & Fun Kid Songs - Bob The Train
programme.desc: Kids songs and nursery rhymes that your little one will love! Come join Bob the train as they sing along and dance in this fun educational video for children and many more preschool popular rhymes for babies like finger family, three little kittens, five little monkeys, learn colors, shapes, abc, and numbers for babies and more.

programme.title: Phonics, ABC & Kids Learning Videos - Bob The Train
programme.desc: Hey Kids, Bob the Train is here to make your learning time fun and easy. So what are we waiting for kids? Enjoy the video and don't forget to sing along with your friend Bob!

programme.title: Alphabets Adventure & More Kids Song - Bob The Train
programme.desc: Bob the train alphabet adventure is a kids TV show where you can learn your alphabets, numbers, colors, shapes, fruits, 123, ABC, modes of transport, animal sounds and more kids learning songs. Come join Bob the Train in his preschool nursery rhymes adventure.

programme.desc: A fast talking, travelling salesman named Wes Weasley sells Robotnik various hedgehog-catching gadgets, including the Darkenator, the Super-duper Gravity Stopper, and the De-Atomizer.
